rule.label: RSI oversold + consecutive red candles near expiry

warnings: Current S&P 500 cache is not point-in-time; survivorship bias may remain.

verdict.headline: Beats random benchmarks, but trails buy-and-hold SPY.
verdict.headline_zh: 优于随机对照组，但跑输了买入并持有 SPY。
reasons: It successfully beat random same-date stock selections (p-value: 0.033).
It successfully beat random ETF timing (p-value: 0.021).
It trailed passive buy-and-hold SPY (7.47% CAGR vs 11.75% CAGR).
100.0% of the rule's return is explained by ordinary market beta.
